params.note: Only when the caster has 5 Rampage stacks, apply Bleed to every enemy hit. The 5-stack threshold cannot be expressed with the doc's plain Condition shapes (no self-stack condition; selfHasStatus is not a valid condition type), so the conditional Bleed lives entirely in this special handler.
Extends any existing Bleed on each enemy hit by 1 turn; does not apply a new Bleed.
If this attack kills the target, the Blood Frenzy cooldown is reset.
+4% damage per Rampage stack (self damage amplification).
When the Berserker lands a crit, heal 3% of max HP.
Low current HP grants bonus damage scaling. Exact threshold/curve not specified in source data; flagged for tuning.

effects.note: P.5a: was scale 1.0xmaxHp on cd3 (a >100%-maxHp shield kept PERMANENTLY on the tank — the CrusaderTank generic-EHP engine). Now 0.4xmaxHp on cd8 (9s shield / 24s cd ~= 37% uptime): a real cooldown, not a doubled HP bar.

params.note: P.5c-M2: reductionPct 20→0 (a pure PEEL — the redirected damage hits the tank, no free mitigation vanishes) + cd 4→6 (was ~50% uptime of full redirect — generic EHP; now a predict-and-press peel).
P.5c-M2: blocks 2→1 + cd 5→6 — the design intent is a single hard-negate of ONE incoming event (the P5/P7 proactive answer), not a 2-charge burst-peel sponge.

effects.note: P.5c-M2: permanent armour 15→10 (a generic-EHP passive; the intake floor caps stacked mitigation anyway).
Self-only aim window — the bard's old single-ally Overdrive is now the archer steadying their own shot (no party support).
P.5a: party shield halved+ (was 100+1.5xpower → 50+0.6xpower) — keeps the CC-immunity-while-shielded rider + barrier-break, but no longer a big generic-EHP party wall on cd6.
single primary hit; splash special handles adjacent at splashPct (no double-count)
applied to all enemies hit (primary + splashed)
single primary impact; splash special handles the rest at splashPct (no double-count)

params.note: 80% splash to enemies adjacent to the primary impact

effects.note: stun applies only to targets that already had Burn at the moment of impact; evaluated BEFORE Meteor's own Burn is added (this effect is ordered before the Burn application)

params.note: all Burn DoT damage dealt by this caster is increased by 20%
triggers when this caster detonates 4 or more Burn stacks (e.g. via Ignite); grants +25% power for 2 turns

effects.note: P.3: the Lifebinder's typed dispel — strips Nature/Poison from the whole party (the Mire's Creeping Rot curse). A pure cleanse, so the brain HOLDS it and fires it reactively when the party is cursed.

P.5c-M2: was a -35% PARTY-wide DR major (generic EHP that any Guardian comp rode); recost to SELF/tank only (a Shield-Wall personal cooldown) per the Class-Tools design — the grip/intercept verbs that were meant to replace it (P11/P7) ship in P.5d/P.5e.
P.5a: was a PARTY-WIDE 0.35xmaxHp shield (generic party EHP); now a SINGLE-ally peel (0.5xmaxHp on one ally) per the design's immunity/peel intent — no longer a party shield wall.
